name: Digio
description: Indian e-signature, KYC and document workflow APIs — Aadhaar e-sign, video KYC and paperless onboarding.

seo.title: Digio — Identity / Auth / User Management
seo.meta_description: Digio: Indian e-signature, KYC and document workflow APIs — Aadhaar e-sign, video KYC and paperless onboarding.

when_to_use: Aadhaar e-sign for paperless Indian financial onboarding
Video KYC for RBI-compliant remote bank account opening
Digital document workflow automation for Indian enterprises
eSign API integration for NBFC loan origination systems
Legally binding e-signature for Indian SaaS contract flows

pros: Full Indian KYC stack: Aadhaar e-sign, PAN, video KYC
RBI-aligned workflows for lending and fintech onboarding
Paperless contract flows with audit trails
cons: India-only; no value outside that market
Dependent on UIDAI and regulator uptime
Docs can lag behind product changes
review.verdict: Practical KYC+e-sign bundle for Indian fintechs, lenders and NBFCs needing regulator-aligned onboarding.
review.best_for: Indian fintech and lending startups building Aadhaar-based onboarding
review.not_for: Global products that need multi-region identity verification

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Usage-based pricing scales up and down
